meta.title: Corporate Website Cost: Pricing, Scope, Timeline | Site Institucional
meta.description: Understand corporate website cost with clear scope, SEO-first performance, and integrations: headless CMS blog, i18n, GA4/GTM, HubSpot forms, GDPR, WCAG, and WhatsApp.

hero.h1: Corporate website cost: get a fast, compliant, SEO-ready site-institucional
hero.subtitle: A corporate website built for Core Web Vitals, on-page SEO, and measurable leads.

pain.title: Common headaches before a corporate site goes live
bullets: Have you ever launched a site that looks great but loads slowly and hurts LCP and conversions?
Have you ever published blog content, yet pages never rank because on-page SEO and structure were missed?
Have you ever lost leads because forms break, CRM routing fails, or HubSpot fields do not map correctly?

benefits.title: Faster pages
benefits.desc: You get a performance-first build that targets strong LCP and stable Core Web Vitals across real devices.

benefits.title: SEO foundation
benefits.desc: You get clean information architecture, metadata, schema basics, and on-page SEO that supports long-term rankings.

benefits.title: Lead tracking
benefits.desc: You get contact forms that connect to your CRM or HubSpot, plus GA4 and GTM events you can trust.

scope.title: What’s included in your corporate website

useCases.title: New company launch
useCases.desc: A credible corporate site to present your brand, services, and team, with tracking ready from day one.

useCases.title: B2B lead capture
useCases.desc: Service pages plus forms that route to your CRM or HubSpot with UTM data and clean attribution.

useCases.title: Content-driven growth
useCases.desc: A headless CMS blog that keeps marketing independent while maintaining performance and SEO consistency.

useCases.title: Global teams
useCases.desc: Internationalized pages with i18n structure so you can publish localized copy without duplicating work.

useCases.title: Compliance-first brands
useCases.desc: A site designed with GDPR considerations, WCAG accessibility, and clear analytics governance via GTM.

stack.title: Delivery options that fit your team

options.name: Next.js
options.note: Great for CWV, SSR/SSG, and fast marketing pages with strong LCP targets.

options.name: Headless CMS
options.note: A blog your team can edit safely, with structured fields and editorial workflows.

options.name: HubSpot
options.note: Forms and contact routing with reliable field mapping and lifecycle tracking.

options.name: GA4 + GTM
options.note: Analytics and tag governance with event standards, conversions, and UTM capture.

options.name: Accessibility
options.note: WCAG-aligned components and content patterns that reduce legal and UX risk.

steps.title: Define scope
steps.desc: We confirm pages, languages, integrations, and success metrics so your estimate is accurate.

steps.title: Build and integrate
steps.desc: We ship a fast corporate site with headless CMS, i18n, forms, CRM/HubSpot, and WhatsApp.

steps.title: Verify and launch
steps.desc: We validate Core Web Vitals, WCAG basics, GDPR consent, and GA4/GTM tracking before go-live.

faq.q: What drives corporate website cost the most?
faq.a: Scope and complexity: number of pages, i18n languages, headless CMS blog requirements, integrations (CRM/HubSpot), and performance targets like LCP and Core Web Vitals.

faq.q: Can you connect contact forms to HubSpot or our CRM?
faq.a: Yes. You get form validation, spam protection, field mapping, and routing that sends leads to HubSpot or your CRM with UTM data where applicable.

faq.q: Do you handle GDPR and cookie consent setup?
faq.a: Yes. You get consent-aware analytics setup guidance and implementations that help you control what fires in GTM and what is measured in GA4.

faq.q: How do you improve LCP and Core Web Vitals?
faq.a: You get an approach focused on image strategy, critical rendering paths, efficient components, and practical checks so real users see faster pages.

faq.q: Will the site meet WCAG accessibility requirements?
faq.a: You get WCAG-aligned patterns and checks, with accessible navigation, form labels, focus states, and content guidance to reduce risk and improve UX.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to price your corporate website with confidence?
ctaFinal.desc: Share your pages, languages, and integrations. You get a clear scope and a corporate website cost estimate you can defend internally.
